title: Sledgehammers
description: Adds Sledgehammers! Sledgehammer are multi-tools that are efficient against every block!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52493364f9140d629b418b2d70b0b53b8be0c61b.png)

Introduction

Sledgehammers adds 7 new Sledgehammer items. Sledgehammers are multi-tool items that are efficient against any and every block. When charged and released, Sledgehammers can excavate, vein mine, and fell trees. There's a Sledgehammer for every vanilla tool tier: Wood, Stone, Iron, Gold, Diamond, Netherite. The last tier is called "Starlight" and is a hard-to-craft but unbreakable Sledgehammer.  

Modpack Policy

You can use this mod in any modpack whether it's public or private. Just do not claim this mod as your own!
